name: Lentil Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 Double crust 9-inch Whole Wheat Pie Shells -- Unbaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils and place them in a pan with the water. Cover and cook for about 40 minutes, or until the water is absorbed.
2. Heat the olive oil in a skillet; add the celery, onion, thyme, cinnamon, and cloves. Sauté until the celery is just barely tender.
3. Add the cooked lentils to the celery-onion mixture; then add the remaining ingredients. Mix well.
4. Spread the mixture into an unbaked pie shell. Cover with the top crust. Crimp the edges and cut a hole in the center of the top crust to allow steam to escape.
5. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
6. Serve with steamed vegetables and a green salad. The lentil pie also pairs well with a sauce or homemade relish.
